Gorgeous Bridal (Heavy Work)
This package includes dense floral and paisley patterns with more filled areas, giving the hands a rich and decorative bridal appearance.
The design includes balanced detailing and elegant motifs, making the hands look beautifully full without being extremely intricate.
Best For: Brides who want a fuller and more decorative bridal look.
Package Options • Three Quarter Hands – 3,000/-
• From Elbow – 3,500/-
• Upper Elbow – 5,000/-
